# Astraventa
> High-performance AI Automation & Lead Intelligence Agency.

## Founders
- **Zeeshan Jay**: Lead Architect. Expert in Agentic Workflows & LLM Orchestration.
- **Haider Shabbir**: Technical Lead. Expert in Scalable Automation & Systems.

## Core Expertise
- **Agentic Workflows**: Multi-agent RAG pipelines using Google Vertex AI and OpenAI.
- **Lead Sniper Engine**: Custom Python-based lead intelligence for B2B firms.
- **Web Automation**: Professional-grade scrapers and business process automation.

## Technical Stack
- Framework: Next.js
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Payments: Paddle
